name: High Whale Inflow + Negative Sentiment -> Bearish Alert

params.message: ⚠️ BEARISH ALERT: Significant whale inflow ({whale_inflow_btc} BTC) to exchanges combined with strong negative market sentiment ({recent_sentiment_score_formatted}). High risk of a price drop.

name: High Whale Outflow + Positive Sentiment -> Bullish Alert

params.message: 🚀 BULLISH ALERT: Significant whale outflow ({whale_outflow_btc} BTC) from exchanges combined with strong positive market sentiment ({recent_sentiment_score_formatted}). High potential for a price rally.
🧠 AI PREDICTION: Gemini model predicts a **{ai_prediction_trend}** trend with {ai_prediction_confidence_formatted} confidence. Reason: '{ai_prediction_comment}'
⚡️ MARKET ALERT: High volatility detected. BTC price changed by {market_volatility_pct_formatted} in the last minute.
